heading: Conditions and form of disclosure to consumers
label: 1681h Conditions and form of disclosure to consumers
notes: Amendments1996—, inserted “and form” after “Conditions” in section catchline.Pub. L. 104–208, § 2408(e)(5)(B)Subsec. (a). , inserted heading and amended text of subsec. (a) generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “A consumer reporting agency shall make the disclosures required under during normal business hours and on reasonable notice.”Pub. L. 104–208, § 2408(e)(1)section 1681g of this titleSubsec. (b). , inserted heading and amended text of subsec. (b) generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “The disclosures required under shall be made to the consumer—Pub. L. 104–208, § 2408(e)(1)section 1681g of this title“(1) in person if he appears in person and furnishes proper identification; or“(2) by telephone if he has made a written request, with proper identification, for telephone disclosure and the toll charge, if any, for the telephone call is prepaid by or charged directly to the consumer.”Subsec. (e). , inserted “or based on information disclosed by a user of a consumer report to or for a consumer against whom the user has taken adverse action, based in whole or in part on the report” before “except”.Pub. L. 104–208, § 2408(e)(4)

children.heading: Proper identification
children.label: 1 Proper identification
children.text: A consumer reporting agency shall require, as a condition of making the disclosures required under , that the consumer furnish proper identification.section 1681g of this title

children.heading: Disclosure in writing
children.label: 2 Disclosure in writing
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b), the disclosures required to be made under shall be provided under that section in writing.section 1681g of this title

children.label: i
children.text: specified by the consumer in accordance with paragraph (2); and

children.label: A
children.text: in person, upon the appearance of the consumer at the place of business of the consumer reporting agency where disclosures are regularly provided, during normal business hours, and on reasonable notice;

children.label: B
children.text: by telephone, if the consumer has made a written request for disclosure by telephone;

children.label: C
children.text: by electronic means, if available from the agency; or

children.label: D
children.text: by any other reasonable means that is available from the agency.

children.heading: Trained personnel
children.label: c Trained personnel
children.text: Any consumer reporting agency shall provide trained personnel to explain to the consumer any information furnished to him pursuant to .section 1681g of this title

children.heading: Persons accompanying consumer
children.label: d Persons accompanying consumer
children.text: The consumer shall be permitted to be accompanied by one other person of his choosing, who shall furnish reasonable identification. A consumer reporting agency may require the consumer to furnish a written statement granting permission to the consumer reporting agency to discuss the consumer’s file in such person’s presence.

children.heading: Limitation of liability
children.label: e Limitation of liability
children.text: Except as provided in sections 1681n and 1681 of this title, no consumer may bring any action or proceeding in the nature of defamation, invasion of privacy, or negligence with respect to the reporting of information against any consumer reporting agency, any user of information, or any person who furnishes information to a consumer reporting agency, based on information disclosed pursuant to section 1681g, 1681h, or 1681m of this title, or based on information disclosed by a user of a consumer report to or for a consumer against whom the user has taken adverse action, based in whole or in part on the report except as to false information furnished with malice or willful intent to injure such consumer.o2So in original. Probably should be followed by a comma.2
